messages.text: My Claude tool-use loop is making too many API calls

messages.header: curl -s localhost:5110/api/events | jq '[.[] | select(.summary | contains("anthropic"))] | length'

messages.text: Smello captured 14 calls to `api.anthropic.com/v1/messages` for a single user query. Each response has `stop_reason: "tool_use"` and the model keeps calling the same `get_weather` tool in a loop. Your tool result is missing the `type: "tool_result"` field, so Claude doesn't recognize it as a response.
